ddls:
CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., CoNLL 2000) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the format */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the format */,
  "readable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format is readable */,
  "writable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format is writable */,
  "custom_layers" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format supports custom annotation layers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation layer (e.g., POS, chunks) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the annotation layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation layer (e.g., POS, chunks, named entities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format used for annotation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being annotated */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation layer */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_annotations_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES annotation_layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_annotations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the email address has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, annotator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., administrator, annotator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation history entry */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the annotation (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_history_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES dataset_annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_annotations_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation history entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being annotated */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the annotation (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_annotations_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_annotations_history_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_annotations_history_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES dataset_annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_layers" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation layer supported by the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id", "layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_formats" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format used by the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layer_dependencies" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation layer */,
  "dependent_layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent annotation layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id", "dependent_layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_validation_rules" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., regex, string matching) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id", "rule_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_validation_results" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format used by the dataset */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the validation rule (true or false) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Brief message about the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "format_id", "rule_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)
